name: Mount Emerald
notable: 53x Vestas V117-3.45MW. Ergon Energy 12.5yr PPA. Queenslands largest wind farm at commissioning. RATCH-Australia owns.

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: RATCH-Australia began construction on Atherton Tablelands

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Mount Emerald Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 91.5 m hub for V117-3.45 MW on the Atherton Tablelands QLD
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Mount Emerald, Atherton Tablelands, Far North QLD
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Mount Emerald 132/33 kV substation (new on-site), Powerlink Tablelands 132 kV network, Far North QLD
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~20 km of 132 kV line to Powerlink Tablelands 132 kV network, Far North QLD.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: Powerlink Far North QLD 132 kV network reinforcement. Mount Emerald and adjacent Kaban share connection infrastructure. Both required combined network upgrade.
eis_specs.notes: 181 MW (52 x 3.45 MW Vestas V117), Mount Emerald, Atherton Tablelands, Far North QLD (near Cairns). Developer: Ratch Australia. QLD EIS approved 2013. Now operating (2018). 132 kV Powerlink connection — constrained by the remote Far North QLD grid. Adjacent to 152 MW Kaban Wind Farm.
